subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending mind and understanding, befitteth the Lord of all worlds, Who through His Most Great Name hath cast down the standard of polytheism [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک و عقول مولی العالم را لایق و سزاست که باسم اعظم علم شرک را
subcodes.subjects: @dissimulation [taqiyyih]; concealment or denial of Faith, @Greatest Name, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @development of capacity and readiness
